name: sgcopenapi-delphi
description: Use when writing Delphi or C++Builder code that uses the eSeGeCe sgcOpenAPI library (OpenAPI 3.0 parser and code generator, plus an OpenAPI server component for code-first and spec-first REST APIs). Provides the public component and class API (properties, methods, events), the unit/uses mapping, and usage examples, for developers who do not have the library source.
